items.title: Base Endurance Run
items.description: Run 8 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Perform a full-body weight training session including 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise: squats, lunges, bench press, and rows. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, complete 5x600m intervals at a pace of 5:00 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a very easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km to aid recovery. Keep heart rate below 135 bpm.
